parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM enablement.deliveries WHERE delivered_at >= '{{ $json.week_start_iso }}'::timestamptz AND delivered_at <= '{{ $json.week_end_iso }}'::timestamptz UNION SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM enablement.feedback WHERE submitted_at >= '{{ $json.week_start_iso }}'::timestamptz AND submitted_at <= '{{ $json.week_end_iso }}'::timestamptz UNION SELECT DISTINCT owner_id AS user_id FROM enablement.view_events WHERE viewed_at >= '{{ $json.week_start_iso }}'::timestamptz AND viewed_at <= '{{ $json.week_end_iso }}'::timestamptz;

WITH week_range AS (SELECT '{{ $('Compute Week Range').item.json.week_start_iso }}'::timestamptz AS ws, '{{ $('Compute Week Range').item.json.week_end_iso }}'::timestamptz AS we),
delivery_stats AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS deliveries_count, COUNT(DISTINCT artifact_type) AS artifacts_updated FROM enablement.deliveries, week_range WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND delivered_at >= ws AND delivered_at <= we),
feedback_stats AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS feedback_count, ROUND(AVG(rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_rating FROM enablement.feedback, week_range WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND submitted_at >= ws AND submitted_at <= we),
view_stats AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS views_count, COUNT(DISTINCT viewer_id) AS unique_viewers FROM enablement.view_events, week_range WHERE owner_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND viewed_at >= ws AND viewed_at <= we),
top_sections AS (SELECT unnest(useful_sections) AS section FROM enablement.feedback, week_range WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND submitted_at >= ws AND submitted_at <= we),
top_missing AS (SELECT unnest(missing_items) AS item FROM enablement.feedback, week_range WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND submitted_at >= ws AND submitted_at <= we),
open_gaps AS (SELECT gap_type, description, severity, competitor_name FROM enablement.gaps WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND resolved_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 10)
SELECT d.deliveries_count, d.artifacts_updated, f.feedback_count, COALESCE(f.avg_rating, 0) AS avg_rating, v.views_count, v.unique_viewers, (SELECT ARRAY_AGG(section ORDER BY cnt DESC) FROM (SELECT section, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM top_sections GROUP BY section ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5) sub) AS top_referenced_sections, (SELECT ARRAY_AGG(item ORDER BY cnt DESC) FROM (SELECT item, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM top_missing GROUP BY item ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5) sub) AS unaddressed_items, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('gap_type', gap_type, 'description', description, 'severity', severity, 'competitor_name', competitor_name)) FROM open_gaps) AS coverage_gaps FROM delivery_stats d, feedback_stats f, view_stats v;

INSERT INTO enablement.scorecards (user_id, week_start, week_end, data) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.week_start }}'::date, '{{ $json.week_end }}'::date, '{{ $json.scorecard_data }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (user_id, week_start) DO UPDATE SET data = EXCLUDED.data, created_at = now() RETURNING id;
